Subject: 92.4.163.49
To: Recipients <test@test.com>
From: "Mrs. Anke D'Angelo" <test@test.com>
Date: Fri, 15 May 2026 00:05:01 -0700
Reply-To: angeloanke378@gmail.com

World Bank Group (WBG). Switzerland
No 7 Bis Avenue de la Paix, 1202 Geneva, Switzerland

                                                                     RE: TR=
ANSFER OF $6,500,000.00 MILLION USD.

Dear Esteemed Beneficiary,

I am writing to inform you of a significant development following an urgent=
 meeting held last week in Geneva Switzerland, with the President of the Wo=
rld Bank, Mr. Ajay Banga, the United Nations Secretary-General, senior repr=
esentatives from the International Monetary Fund (IMF), as well as the Lond=
on and Paris Clubs. The purpose of this meeting was to address the compensa=
tion of unpaid contractors globally, as well as individuals who have tragic=
ally lost loved ones due to ongoing conflicts, natural disasters, or calami=
ties.

In line with the World Bank's commitment to making the world a better place=
 and helping those in need, I am pleased to inform you that the sum of $6,5=
00,000.00 (Six Million Five Hundred Thousand United States Dollars) has bee=
n approved in your favor as part of this global initiative.

To facilitate the release of these funds, I kindly ask you to contact the C=
redit Suisse Group AG, based in Basel Switzerland as soon as possible, usin=
g the details provided below, so that they can process your payment promptl=
y.

Contact info
Name: Mr. Chris Mark
Email: chrismark@execs.com
Remittance Manager, Credit Suisse Group AG
Address: Paradeplatz 8, 8001 Zurich, Switzerland.

Please make sure to provide the following details to expedite the
payment process:

     Valid ID Card
     Full Name
     Residential Address
     Office Address
     Cell Phone Number
     Office Phone Number
     Occupation

I kindly request that you update me once you have made contact with the pay=
ment processing team at Credit Suisse Group AG to ensure that your funds ar=
e remitted without delay.

Thank you for your attention to this matter, and I look forward to
hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Mrs. Anke D'Angelo
Vice President and Auditor-General
World Bank Group
